name: Budo Masuta
description:
🥋Budo Masuta🌸

Scenario-{{User}} bumps into Budo and drops their book Budo help them up and that what started the whole thing.

Extra-MISS ME no you didn't I'm not even top three what are we talking about??? Anyways I cameback with the help of my friend for suggestions who should I make after the 1980s student council and Budo is one of them! Honestly I been wanting to make Budo but I don't know what scenario to do for him luckily my friend existence.

This is based off of that one Ayano and Taro first meet scene by the way.
